pages.title: Wearing the work
pages.text: All three baubles slot into the $(item)Curios$() ring/necklace slots. They stay passive while worn — no toggle, no activation keystroke — and their LP draw comes from whichever $(l:bloodmagic:altar/soul_network)Soul Network$() the wearer is bound to.

pages.title: Vampire Ring
pages.text: On a melee hit, converts a fraction of dealt damage into healing for the wearer. Modest lifesteal, but it stacks with your existing attack bonuses — durable for sustained combat.

pages.title: Sacrifice Amulet
pages.text: Kills that happen near your altar route extra LP into the reservoir while worn. Pairs well with a $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/glass)Glass Dagger of Sacrifice$() and a mob farm.

pages.title: Self-Sacrifice Amulet
pages.text: Mirror of the above: self-drawn LP (from sacrificial daggers, sigils, and similar) deposits into the altar at a higher rate while worn.
